query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementItems ci INNER JOIN complementGroups cg ON ci.groupId = cg.id WHERE cg.productId = p.id) as complementCount
FROM products p 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 60018 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementItems ci INNER JOIN complementGroups cg ON ci.groupId = cg.id WHERE cg.productId = p.id) > 0
LIMIT 10;
